query:
SELECT 
  ba.id, ba.name, ba.bankName, ba.accountNumber,
  COUNT(bt.id) as txnCount,
  MIN(bt.date) as earliestDate,
  MAX(bt.date) as latestDate
FROM bankAccounts ba
LEFT JOIN bankTransactions bt ON bt.bankAccountId = ba.id
GROUP BY ba.id, ba.name, ba.bankName, ba.accountNumber
ORDER BY ba.id
